criteria_results.description: Minimize mobile toolbar, remove unnecessary tools, leave only Save, Export ZIP, and Export PDF
criteria_results.evidence: Toolbar.tsx (lines 40-52, 91-96) hides ToolSelector, ObjectPropertyEditor, and ZoomControls on mobile. ProjectActions.tsx (lines 48-81) provides a dedicated mobile view with only Save, Download (Export PDF), and Archive (Export ZIP) buttons.

criteria_results.description: Perform automatic project save after every loaded photo
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 74) calls handleSave(true) within the handleFileChange function immediately after adding a new photo to the document state.

criteria_results.description: Enlarge mobile bottom bar and enable status change for PM role
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 110, 174-213) increases the bar height and adds a scrollable row of enlarged status buttons specifically for PM users when an object is selected. These buttons also trigger auto-save (line 206).

suggestions: Consider adding a visual confirmation or toast message when auto-save completes to reassure the user on mobile.
next_focus: The implementation is approved. No further changes are requested for this iteration.

commit_message.subject: Minimize mobile UI and implement PM status quick-actions
commit_message.body:
- Simplify mobile Toolbar by hiding non-essential tools and text labels.
- Refactor ProjectActions to show direct buttons on mobile for Save, ZIP, and PDF export.
- Implement auto-save after photo uploads and status changes.
- Enhance MobileBottomBar with enlarged PM status selection buttons for better accessibility.
